visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a light pink sleeveless jumpsuit over a white top and light yellow slides, walks toward the camera in a brightly lit, modern white hallway with a marble-patterned floor. She is seen adjusting the shoulder straps of her jumpsuit. (2) Multiple objects are dropped onto the floor in a sequence of close-up shots. First, several pens scatter; then, pink and silver beauty supplement pouches; followed by small notebooks, a red quilted bag, a teal quilted bag, a small printed crossbody bag, a white helmet with colorful polka dots, and finally a large teal rolling suitcase. Hands with manicured nails are seen releasing the items. (3) A different woman with long dark hair and silver hoop earrings, wearing a white sleeveless dress, is shown sitting on the floor next to the teal suitcase. She holds up a pink beauty supplement pouch to her face, examining it with a curious expression. The woman in the pink jumpsuit enters the frame from the right. (4) Close-up product shots show boxes of 'EVOLSENSE Light It Up Beauty Drink' and individual pink pouches. A white plate displays a thick, orange-yellow liquid. The woman in the pink jumpsuit is shown from the chest up, tearing open a pouch and drinking from it while smiling. (5) Technical product information is displayed. The woman holds up a phone showing certificates or test reports against a hallway background. Then, product shots of 'EVOLSENSE I See You' capsules appear, showing the box and several dark, glossy capsules. A hand holds a single dark capsule between a thumb and forefinger. (6) The woman in the pink jumpsuit is seen in a white kitchen area with a refrigerator. She takes a capsule and drinks from a glass of water. (7) Back in the hallway, the two women stand together, talking and laughing. The woman in white holds the capsule pack, and the woman in pink holds the drink pouch. They point and gesture toward the camera as text overlays appear.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: (?). (2) [Subtitle]: 欸 抓到 看到你最近氣色特別好 原來都是喝這個. (3) [Subtitle]: 當然阿 不喝這個怎麼行 跟你推薦 璦研司光之飲. (4) [Slogan]: 璦研司光之飲. (5) [Variety]: 高效原料. (6) [Slogan]: (添加冰晶番茄、玻尿酸、穀胱甘肽、玫瑰花瓣). (7) [Variety]: 打造多功能養顏系飲品. (8) [Subtitle]: 像現在呢 每天都有拍攝 維持膚況很重要 每天都要喝一包. (9) [Variety]: 維持膚況很重要. (10) [Variety]: 每天都要喝一包. (11) [Slogan]: SGS檢驗食安有保障. (12) [Slogan]: 檢驗&得獎哦!!. (13) [Subtitle]: 另外呢還有這款 采亮葉黃素 除了有葉黃素黃金配方. (14) [Variety]: 采亮葉黃素. (15) [Slogan]: 葉黃素黃金配方 (美國專利FloraGLO® 葉黃素 Zeaone® 玉米黃素10:2黃金比例). (16) [Subtitle]: 他們蝦紅素的含量還超高 達8毫克 很少看到加那麼高的. (17) [Variety]: 使用專利蝦紅素AstaPure® 產量為全球最大 達8毫克. (18) [Subtitle]: 它還另外添加含有高單位Omega-3的亞麻仁籽油 號稱是素食界的魚油喔. (19) [Variety]: 高單位Omega-3 亞麻仁籽油. (20) [Variety]: 素食界魚油. (21) [Subtitle]: 而且光之飲跟采亮葉黃素 全都是全素友善 吃素的都可以安心使用. (22) [Variety]: 全素友善 (吃素的都可以安心使用). (23) [Subtitle]: 像我們平常看一堆 樣品 數字 還有業績 這個要天天補充才有感哎. (24) [Subtitle]: 那我要每天跟在你後面嘛. (25) [Subtitle]: 幹嘛. (26) [Subtitle]: 隨時撿你掉下來的光之飲與葉黃素. (27) [Subtitle]: 欸 我以為你要跟著我團購欸. (28) [Subtitle]: 現在都有團購優惠啦 趕快到首頁點選團購連結. (29) [Slogan]: 現在都有團購優惠 快到首頁 點選團購連結

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters interacting in the hallway.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a pink sleeveless jumpsuit over a white top; the other wears a white sleeveless dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist hallway with white walls and marble floors; a clean white kitchen with a Panasonic refrigerator.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced electronic pop background music track featuring a steady 4/4 beat. A rapid sequence of percussive impact sounds occurs, mimicking objects falling on a hard floor: light clicks for pens, muffled thuds for bags, and a heavy, resonant impact for a suitcase. (2) A female voice (Voice A) enters with a high-pitched, surprised, and playful tone, speaking at a moderate speed. The BGM maintains its energy. (3) A second female voice (Voice B) responds with a warm, confident, and professional narrative tone, explaining product benefits. The speech is clear and well-enunciated. (4) As Voice B describes technical details, the BGM continues, providing a consistent high-energy backdrop. Short 'whoosh' and 'pop' sound effects are used for emphasis during visual transitions. (5) In the final segment, both voices are heard interacting with laughter and a friendly, lighthearted tone. The audio concludes with Voice B delivering an energetic call-to-action as the BGM fades out sharply with the video end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote EVOLSENSE beauty supplements (Light It Up Beauty Drink and I See You capsules) by using a relatable, everyday scenario of dropping items to 'reveal' the secret to good skin. It combines personal testimony, technical benefit explanation, and safety certification to build trust and encourage viewers to join a group buy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product display, verbal recommendation, and specific brand social media call-to-action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The fast-paced editing and high-energy BGM are characteristic of social media short-form advertisements designed to maintain viewer attention.
